summary: Add structured request-id logging across serving and restore
description: Tracing a single request or restore job across logs today means grepping for timestamps and hoping nothing else logged in the same window. We want every log line touched by a request to carry its request id or job id.

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: log in src/util/log.ts already accepts a fields object, so this is mostly a discipline problem: every call site along the request and restore paths needs to pass requestId or jobId through.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: the http and router modules are the easy ones, will thread requestId through those

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: threaded jobId through the restore coordinator, fetcher, and loader call sites

comments.author: Elena Petrova
comments.body: Confirmed every log line on both paths now carries an id. This was a decision to standardize on structured JSON logs generally, see HEL-470 for that. Resolving.
